overall_summary: ElizaOS is transitioning into a high-velocity phase for its v2.0.0 and beta launches, focusing on multi-language support (Rust, Python) and decentralized agent identity via the SAID Protocol. Security remains a high priority with successful real-time rugpull detection tests and new trust layer integrations like MoltBridge.
key_facts: Vlt9 reported the successful detection of DARKTRUMP and NVIDIA token rugpulls 2 hours before crashes using a live testing system.
The SAID Protocol was integrated into the core eliza repository to provide agents with on-chain Solana identity and verifiable signatures.
PR #6509 initiated 'The Great Database Refactor' to improve system speed by 14x and separate Drizzle dependencies from the core.
ElizaOS announced a strategic partnership and investment from TSX-V listed firm Secure Blockchain to expand into capital markets.
The ai16z token migration period officially ended after 90 days, with team members confirming no further support for holders who missed the deadline.
Plugin-n8n-workflow received a critical bug fix ensuring default property values are applied before visibility checks to stabilize LLM interactions.
Mobile support improvements were implemented for elizaos.news to enhance community accessibility.
The team confirmed $elizaos as the main token and established a revenue-based buyback mechanism.
open_questions: Is anyone interested in MVP development or preparing for the Agentic AI-to-workflow integration stage?
Which person should I approach for an AMA collab proposal?
Is there any way to help me with coin migration? I don't want to lose my coins.
Are you open to a quick DM or a technical chat to discuss a potential integration for MoltBridge?
Is the mcp-gateway repository ready for website integration?

new_issues_prs.title: feat: add SAID Protocol on-chain Solana identity for ElizaOS agents
new_issues_prs.author: kaiclawd
new_issues_prs.significance: Introduces verifiable on-chain identity for agents, acting as a digital passport on Solana.

new_issues_prs.title: chore: the great database refactor
new_issues_prs.author: odilitime
new_issues_prs.significance: Significant architectural overhaul moving Drizzle out of core and improving query speeds by 14x.

new_issues_prs.title: feat: next generation multi-language Eliza with Rust, Python and TypeScript support
new_issues_prs.author: lalalune
new_issues_prs.significance: Expansion of the framework to Rust and Python, removing non-essential infrastructure for a leaner runtime.

new_issues_prs.title: [Bug] URL in message triggers duplicate LLM calls
new_issues_prs.author: thewoweffect
new_issues_prs.significance: Identifies a critical cost and UX issue where URLs trigger double API calls.

overall_focus.claim: Development is centered on core framework modularization for the v2.0.0 release, prioritizing multi-language support and database performance optimizations.

discord_updates.summary: Discussions on Agentic AI-to-workflow integration and the success of a new rugpull detection system for Solana.
Focus on event coordination for EthDenver, user concerns regarding the expired ai16z token migration, and improvements to the elizaos.news mobile site.
Proposal to adopt HackMD MCP tool for collaborative documentation to minimize copy-pasting for the dev team.

user_feedback.feedback_summary: Users expressed significant frustration and anxiety regarding the 90-day ai16z migration deadline, with some claiming health issues prevented participation.
Community members found the 'spread' design of the new news platform to have better visual appeal and readability.

strategic_insights.insight: The simultaneous launch of MoltBridge and the integration of SAID Protocol suggests a strategic pivot toward verifiable agent identity to combat malicious skills and rugpulls.
implications_or_questions: How will these trust layers affect the listing speed for new community plugins?

market_analysis.observation: Expansion into traditional capital markets via a partnership with the TSX-V listed firm Secure Blockchain.
market_analysis.relevance: Provides institutional validation and potential new funding streams for the ecosystem.
